trigger_keywords: enfriamiento del mosto antes de la fermentación

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Fresh must is cooled before the intended alcoholic fermentation begins.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Low temperature slows indigenous yeast and bacterial activity and gives the producer time to settle, protect, or inoculate the must.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Fermentation can begin under more controlled timing and microbiological conditions.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Fermentation can begin under more controlled timing and microbiological conditions.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
